examples: When you summarize, you condense an extended idea or argument into a sentence or more in your own words.
If some reefs are destroyed by storms, starfish populations that inhabited those reefs would have to condense and concentrate on the reefs that are left.
The arch-fiend whispered him to condense into a small compass.
Then at the end of the semester, I would condense those summaries into a smaller document.
There are now several programs that condense the four years into 36 months, Owen says.
